checks.name: Required spec part presence
checks.details: P1-SPEC-01 through P1-SPEC-08 are present. P1-SPEC-00 planning inputs are present.

checks.name: Required output family presence
checks.details: Each P1 Spec part declares Contract, Rule, Projection, Validator Spec, Examples, and Implementation Blueprint families.

checks.name: Human review decision presence
checks.details: All checked P1 candidates have REVIEW_DECISION.json.

checks.name: Human review hash binding
checks.details: P1-SPEC-00 through P1-SPEC-08 review subject hashes match current generated outputs.

checks.name: Phase output assembly
checks.details: Phase output artifacts are assembled as Candidate planning evidence. Canonical SPEC_LOCK still requires phase-level Human Gate approval and Python-controlled lock tooling.

checks.name: Implementation authorization
checks.details: No repository implementation is authorized by this Candidate.

recommended_next_actions: Human Gate reviews this phase-level lock readiness candidate.
If accepted, record a phase-level review decision for the exact phase candidate subject hash.
Use Python-controlled lock tooling to create canonical P1 SPEC_LOCK.
Do not start implementation workpacks until canonical P1 SPEC_LOCK exists.
